betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Schrabidium§f is an exotic radioactive element unique to HBM's Nuclear Tech.

§eTask:§f Obtain 1x §bSchrabidium Nugget§f

§eObtaining:§f
• §bExposure Chamber§f + §bHiggs Boson Capsule§f + Uranium-238
• §bNuclear Explosions§f near uranium ore (transmutation)
• Very rare meteor drops

§eProperties:§f
• Emits §c15 RAD/s§f constantly
• Glows with characteristic green color
• Extremely valuable for end-game crafting

§eUses:§f
• §bMagnetized Tungsten§f for Fusion Reactors
• §bFerric Schrabidate§f for Dineutronium
• Advanced end-game components

§c§4RADIATION WARNING:§f Always wear full hazmat when handling!

§aTip:§f The gateway to end-game content - protect yourself!
